title: OcexCatalog
description: An OCEX product catalog document, equivalent to EDI 832. Represents a vendor's price/sales catalog transmitted to a buyer.

type.description: Discriminator field identifying this as a catalog document.

sender.description: The party sending this catalog (typically the vendor).

receiver.description: The party receiving this catalog (typically the buyer).

documentDate.description: ISO 8601 date on which the catalog was generated (YYYY-MM-DD).

catalogId.description: Vendor-assigned catalog identifier, unique within the sender's system.

effectiveDate.description: ISO 8601 date from which the catalog prices are effective (YYYY-MM-DD).

expirationDate.description: Optional ISO 8601 date after which the catalog expires (YYYY-MM-DD).

items.description: One or more catalog items with pricing information.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for extension or passthrough data.

id.description: Party identifier (e.g. DUNS, GLN, or internal ID).

qualifier.description: EDI qualifier indicating the ID type (e.g. "01" for DUNS).

lineNumber.description: Sequential line number within the catalog.

quantity.description: Minimum order quantity or available quantity.

unitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure code (e.g. "EA" for each, "CS" for case).

buyerPartNumber.description: Buyer's internal part number for cross-reference.

vendorPartNumber.description: Vendor's internal part number for cross-reference.
